findings.title: No alerting on error budget burn
findings.description: There is no alert tied to SLO error budget burn rate.
findings.impact: Reliability regressions can go unnoticed until customers report them.
findings.remediation: Add multi-window burn-rate alerts mapped to the service SLO.

findings.title: Runbook missing for primary service
findings.remediation: Author a runbook covering common failure modes and recovery steps.

findings.title: No incident owner defined
findings.remediation: Assign a primary owner and an escalation path.
